title: DENTAL CLINIC - 211info
text: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB OF ALBANY DENTAL CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Dental clinic providing both urgent and routine dental care. Promotes oral health through education and increasing preventative services. Links patients to the Healthy Kids program (OHP) and local dental providers for ongoing access to care. 1215 Hill Street SE Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: Ages 1-18 without dental insurance or who have ODS, Willamette Dental, Capitol Dental, Advantage, or Open Card OHP dental coverage Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-4pm Email (541) 926-6666 202 .-. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Dental Clinic (541) 926-6666 ext 202 Raquel Hultberg [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: OHP card, if applicable AREA SERVED: Greater Albany Public School District (Cities of Albany and Tangent), Linn County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located between Queen Avenue and Pacific Highway. From Highway 99E (Pacific Boulevard), take a right at the Human Bean coffee shop. In the large building on the left after the United Way of Linn County. Bus stop on the corner. From I-5 South, Exit 234-A: Follow signs to Corvallis and turn left on Hill Street. From I-5 North, Exit 233: Turn left onto Highway 20, follow signs to Corvallis, then turn left on Hill Street. Services: Emergency Dental Care Oral Health Education/Information Pediatric Dentistry Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - HEALTH AND FITNESS SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - BOYS & GIRLS CLUB If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BOYS & GIRLS CLUB OF ALBANY
